{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XzhzJ2TZbcxGaUdgfiyJwD","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NG3u4c9NznHMQueS3g6Zz8","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4317,"cache_read_input_tokens":16353,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4317,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"ed76f0ea-7a71-4fcd-9153-d0088ad26bab"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NG3u4c9NznHMQueS3g6Zz8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    73→  const listing = db\n    74→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→  if (!listing) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    80→      { status: 404 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    87→      { status: 400 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  // Verify both users are members\n    92→  const raterMember = db\n    93→    .prepare(\n    94→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    95→    )\n    96→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    97→\n    98→  if (!raterMember) {\n    99→    return NextResponse.json(\n   100→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   101→      { status: 403 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  const ratedMember = db\n   106→    .prepare(\n   107→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   108→    )\n   109→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   110→\n   111→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   112→    return NextResponse.json(\n   113→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   114→      { status: 400 }\n   115→    );\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   119→  const existing = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (existing) {\n   126→    db.prepare(\n   127→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   128→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   129→  } else {\n   130→    db.prepare(\n   131→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   132→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   133→\n   134→    // Notify the rated user\n   135→    createNotification(\n   136→      ratedUserId,\n   137→      listingId,\n   138→      \"rating_received\",\n   139→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   140→    );\n   141→  }\n   142→\n   143→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   148→ *\n   149→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   150→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   151→ */\n   152→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   153→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   154→  if (!session) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   157→      { status: 401 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   162→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   163→    return NextResponse.json(\n   164→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   165→      { status: 400 }\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   169→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→\n   176→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   177→  const isMember = db\n   178→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   179→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   180→  if (!isMember) {\n   181→    return NextResponse.json(\n   182→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   183→      { status: 403 }\n   184→    );\n   185→  }\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   188→  const givenRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rated_user_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   203→  const receivedRatings = db\n   204→    .prepare(\n   205→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   206→       FROM ratings r\n   207→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   208→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   209→    )\n   210→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   211→      rater_id: number;\n   212→      score: number;\n   213→      comment: string;\n   214→      display_name: string;\n   215→    }[];\n   216→\n   217→  return NextResponse.json({\n   218→    givenRatings,\n   219→    receivedRatings,\n   220→  });\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"e5f5ed34-2b8b-4728-a0b2-ebcfbeda72d4","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:21.431Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019AoutBXwRTaoSrpyeSSxd3","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"1d6d8d20-4b31-4e3d-ac98-f1ab7494c918","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:22.092Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XzhzJ2TZbcxGaUdgfiyJwD","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018EsPNJWWmksJZYmefrmaDU","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4317,"cache_read_input_tokens":16353,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4317,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"71244537-5e1e-44f1-bb72-44b7fca25fa9"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018EsPNJWWmksJZYmefrmaDU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n    60→  let hasApplied = false;\n    61→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    62→  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    63→    const app = db\n    64→      .prepare(\n    65→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    66→      )\n    67→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    68→    if (app) {\n    69→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    70→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    71→    }\n    72→  }\n    73→\n    74→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    75→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    76→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    77→    pendingApplicants = db\n    78→      .prepare(\n    79→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    80→         FROM listing_applications la\n    81→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    82→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    83→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    84→      )\n    85→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    86→  }\n    87→\n    88→  return NextResponse.json({\n    89→    listing: {\n    90→      ...listing,\n    91→      members,\n    92→      memberCount: members.length,\n    93→      isMember,\n    94→      isAuthor,\n    95→      hasApplied,\n    96→      applicationStatus,\n    97→      pendingApplicants,\n    98→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n    99→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   100→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   101→    },\n   102→  });\n   103→}\n   104→\n   105→export async function PATCH(\n   106→  req: NextRequest,\n   107→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   108→) {\n   109→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   110→  if (!session) {\n   111→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   112→  }\n   113→\n   114→  const { id } = await params;\n   115→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   116→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   117→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   118→  }\n   119→\n   120→  const listing = db\n   121→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   122→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   123→\n   124→  if (!listing) {\n   125→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   129→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   133→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   134→    return NextResponse.json(\n   135→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   136→      { status: 400 }\n   137→    );\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  try {\n   141→    const body = await req.json();\n   142→    const {\n   143→      language,\n   144→      readingPace,\n   145→      startDate,\n   146→      meetingFormat,\n   147→      maxGroupSize,\n   148→      requiresApproval,\n   149→      platformPreference,\n   150→    } = body;\n   151→\n   152→    // Validate fields that are provided\n   153→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   154→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   155→    }\n   156→\n   157→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   158→      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   159→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   160→      }\n   161→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   162→      if (startDate < today) {\n   163→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   164→      }\n   165→    }\n   166→\n   167→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n   168→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   169→    }\n   170→\n   171→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   172→      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   173→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   174→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   175→      }\n   176→\n   177→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   178→      const memberCount = (db\n   179→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   180→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   181→\n   182→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   183→        return NextResponse.json(\n   184→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   185→          { status: 400 }\n   186→        );\n   187→      }\n   188→    }\n   189→\n   190→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   191→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   192→    }\n   193→\n   194→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   195→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   196→    }\n   197→\n   198→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   199→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   200→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   201→\n   202→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   203→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   204→      values.push(language);\n   205→    }\n   206→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   207→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   208→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   209→    }\n   210→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   211→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   212→      values.push(startDate);\n   213→    }\n   214→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   215→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   216→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   217→    }\n   218→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   229→    }\n   230→\n   231→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   232→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   233→    }\n   234→\n   235→    values.push(listingId);\n   236→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   237→\n   238→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   239→  } catch (error) {\n   240→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   241→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   242→  }\n   243→}\n   244→\n   245→export async function DELETE(\n   246→  _req: NextRequest,\n   247→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   248→) {\n   249→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   250→  if (!session) {\n   251→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   252→  }\n   253→\n   254→  const { id } = await params;\n   255→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   256→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   257→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   258→  }\n   259→\n   260→  const listing = db\n   261→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   262→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   263→\n   264→  if (!listing) {\n   265→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   266→  }\n   267→\n   268→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   269→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   270→  }\n   271→\n   272→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   273→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   274→    return NextResponse.json(\n   275→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   276→      { status: 400 }\n   277→    );\n   278→  }\n   279→\n   280→  try {\n   281→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   282→    const members = db\n   283→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   284→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   285→\n   286→    // Delete in a transaction\n   287→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   288→      // Notify members before deletion\n   289→      for (const member of members) {\n   290→        try {\n   291→          createNotification(\n   292→            member.user_id,\n   293→            listingId,\n   294→            \"listing_deleted\",\n   295→            `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   296→          );\n   297→        } catch {\n   298→          // Notification failure should not block deletion\n   299→        }\n   300→      }\n   301→\n   302→      // Delete related records first\n   303→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   304→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   305→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   306→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   307→      // Delete the listing itself\n   308→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   309→    });\n   310→\n   311→    deleteTransaction();\n   312→\n   313→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   314→  } catch (error) {\n   315→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   316→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   317→  }\n   318→}\n   319→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"48479ed8-492e-43e4-8253-4586a390b3f2","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:22.361Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0161CocuvUjDqMKFecL1WmUZ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    36→\n    37→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\")) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/...)\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    45→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    46→    listingId\n    47→  );\n    48→\n    49→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    50→}\n    51→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"4dfacb58-6b63-4dc4-971b-14e5185a1d28","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:28.586Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01P5k5ERWZiM2RmuRpA2Y9G6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    23→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    24→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    26→  }\n    27→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    28→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  try {\n    33→    const body = await req.json();\n    34→    const { type } = body;\n    35→\n    36→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    37→      return handleLink(body);\n    38→    }\n    39→\n    40→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    41→    if (type === 1) {\n    42→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    43→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    44→    }\n    45→\n    46→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    47→  } catch (err) {\n    48→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    49→    return NextResponse.json(\n    50→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    51→      { status: 500 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→\n    56→async function handleLink(body: {\n    57→  guildId: string;\n    58→  listingId: number;\n    59→  channelId?: string;\n    60→}) {\n    61→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    62→\n    63→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  const listing = db\n    71→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    72→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→  if (!listing) {\n    75→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    76→  }\n    77→\n    78→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    79→    return NextResponse.json(\n    80→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n    81→      { status: 400 }\n    82→    );\n    83→  }\n    84→\n    85→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    86→    return NextResponse.json(\n    87→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    88→      { status: 400 }\n    89→    );\n    90→  }\n    91→\n    92→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n    93→\n    94→  // If no channel specified, create one\n    95→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    96→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    97→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n    98→      .toLowerCase()\n    99→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   100→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   101→\n   102→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   103→      guildId,\n   104→      channelName,\n   105→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   106→    );\n   107→\n   108→    if (!channel) {\n   109→      return NextResponse.json(\n   110→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   111→        { status: 500 }\n   112→      );\n   113→    }\n   114→\n   115→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Create invite link\n   119→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   120→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   121→    return NextResponse.json(\n   122→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   123→      { status: 500 }\n   124→    );\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  // Save to DB\n   128→  db.prepare(\n   129→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   130→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   131→\n   132→  // Notify all members\n   133→  const members = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   135→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   136→\n   137→  for (const member of members) {\n   138→    createNotification(\n   139→      member.user_id,\n   140→      listingId,\n   141→      \"discord_ready\",\n   142→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   143→    );\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   147→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   148→    targetChannelId,\n   149→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   150→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   151→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   152→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   153→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   154→  );\n   155→\n   156→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   157→}\n   158→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"2ea51445-d337-483e-8e39-b98f0eedec04","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:29.334Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MrgRYsBcaKKwJ1XaAZXaXt","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    15→ *\n    16→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    17→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    18→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    20→ *\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    22→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    23→ */\n    24→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    25→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    26→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    27→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    29→  }\n    30→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    31→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    32→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    36→  try {\n    37→    update = await req.json();\n    38→  } catch {\n    39→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    43→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    44→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    45→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    50→  if (update.message) {\n    51→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    59→  chat: {\n    60→    id: number;\n    61→    title?: string;\n    62→    type: string;\n    63→  };\n    64→  from: {\n    65→    id: number;\n    66→    first_name: string;\n    67→  };\n    68→  new_chat_member: {\n    69→    user: {\n    70→      id: number;\n    71→      is_bot: boolean;\n    72→    };\n    73→    status: string;\n    74→  };\n    75→}\n    76→\n    77→interface TelegramMessage {\n    78→  chat: {\n    79→    id: number;\n    80→    type: string;\n    81→    title?: string;\n    82→  };\n    83→  text?: string;\n    84→  from?: {\n    85→    id: number;\n    86→  };\n    87→}\n    88→\n    89→/**\n    90→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    91→ *\n    92→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    93→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    94→ * 1. Creates the group\n    95→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    96→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    97→ *\n    98→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n    99→ */\n   100→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   101→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   102→\n   103→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   104→  if (\n   105→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   106→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   107→  ) {\n   108→    return;\n   109→  }\n   110→\n   111→  // Only process group chats\n   112→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   113→    return;\n   114→  }\n   115→\n   116→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   117→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   118→  const pending = db\n   119→    .prepare(\n   120→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   121→    )\n   122→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   123→\n   124→  if (pending) {\n   125→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   126→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   127→      chat.id\n   128→    );\n   129→    return;\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   133→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   134→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   135→  await sendMessage(\n   136→    chat.id,\n   137→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   138→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   139→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   140→  );\n   141→\n   142→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   143→  try {\n   144→    db.prepare(\n   145→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   146→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   147→  } catch {\n   148→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   149→  }\n   150→}\n   151→\n   152→/**\n   153→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   154→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   155→ */\n   156→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   157→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   158→    return;\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   162→\n   163→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   164→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   165→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   166→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   167→    if (listingId) {\n   168→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   169→      return;\n   170→    }\n   171→  }\n   172→\n   173→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   174→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   175→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   176→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   177→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   178→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   179→      return;\n   180→    }\n   181→\n   182→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   183→    const linkedUser = db\n   184→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   185→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   186→\n   187→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   188→      await sendMessage(\n   189→        message.chat.id,\n   190→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   191→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   192→      );\n   193→      return;\n   194→    }\n   195→\n   196→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   197→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   198→      .prepare(\n   199→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   200→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   201→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   202→         AND author_id = ?\n   203→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   204→      )\n   205→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   206→\n   207→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   208→      await sendMessage(\n   209→        message.chat.id,\n   210→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   211→      );\n   212→      return;\n   213→    }\n   214→\n   215→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   216→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   217→      return;\n   218→    }\n   219→\n   220→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   221→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n   222→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   223→    await sendMessage(\n   224→      message.chat.id,\n   225→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   226→    );\n   227→    return;\n   228→  }\n   229→\n   230→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   231→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   232→  if (linkMatch) {\n   233→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   234→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   235→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   236→      return;\n   237→    }\n   238→\n   239→    const linkedUser = db\n   240→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   241→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   242→\n   243→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   244→      await sendMessage(\n   245→        message.chat.id,\n   246→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   247→      );\n   248→      return;\n   249→    }\n   250→\n   251→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   252→\n   253→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   254→    const listing = db\n   255→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   256→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   257→\n   258→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   259→      await sendMessage(\n   260→        message.chat.id,\n   261→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   262→      );\n   263→      return;\n   264→    }\n   265→\n   266→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   267→      await sendMessage(\n   268→        message.chat.id,\n   269→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   270→      );\n   271→      return;\n   272→    }\n   273→\n   274→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   275→  }\n   276→}\n   277→\n   278→/**\n   279→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   280→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   281→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   282→ * 3. Notify all members\n   283→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   284→ */\n   285→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   286→  const listing = db\n   287→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   288→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   289→\n   290→  if (!listing) {\n   291→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   292→    return;\n   293→  }\n   294→\n   295→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   296→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   297→    return;\n   298→  }\n   299→\n   300→  // Try to create an invite link\n   301→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   302→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   303→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   304→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   305→  }\n   306→\n   307→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   308→    await sendMessage(\n   309→      chatId,\n   310→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   311→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   312→    );\n   313→    return;\n   314→  }\n   315→\n   316→  // Save to database\n   317→  db.prepare(\n   318→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   319→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   320→\n   321→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   322→  const members = db\n   323→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   324→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   325→\n   326→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   327→  for (const member of members) {\n   328→    createNotification(\n   329→      member.user_id,\n   330→      listingId,\n   331→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   332→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   333→    );\n   334→  }\n   335→\n   336→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   337→  await sendMessage(\n   338→    chatId,\n   339→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   340→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   341→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   342→  );\n   343→}\n   344→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"062ac619-62ef-4f3f-bc2c-83d38dc8c420","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:29.432Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011yFLPQtBmQzjxfAnHNUMMw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"a85386a8-185d-4546-accd-06400c8c9c1f","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:32.430Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FCZf24737DSGCmTGjDt8wu","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n    22→  if (!includePast) {\n    23→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    24→    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    28→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    29→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    33→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    34→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    38→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    39→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  if (startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom)) {\n    43→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    44→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    48→\n    49→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    50→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    51→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    52→\n    53→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    54→\n    55→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    56→  const countResult = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    59→    )\n    60→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    61→\n    62→  const listings = db\n    63→    .prepare(\n    64→      `SELECT\n    65→        l.*,\n    66→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    67→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    68→      FROM listings l\n    69→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    70→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    71→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    72→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    73→    )\n    74→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    75→\n    76→  return NextResponse.json({\n    77→    listings,\n    78→    pagination: {\n    79→      page,\n    80→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    81→      total: countResult.total,\n    82→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    83→    },\n    84→  });\n    85→}\n    86→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"69d04f56-46d7-4eb0-8a78-5f8836bea286","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:32.842Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SUNd2LGQV9ERyNfrr145UQ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"0eb8640f-5a48-4b03-b9d0-757983661150","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:33.318Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XLFZBUuVeAtgAKZud4ixyW","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  member_count: number;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  author_name: string;\n    18→  joined_at: string;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export async function GET() {\n    22→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    23→  if (!session) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    28→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    29→    SELECT\n    30→      l.id,\n    31→      l.book_title,\n    32→      l.book_author,\n    33→      l.book_cover_url,\n    34→      l.reading_pace,\n    35→      l.start_date,\n    36→      l.meeting_format,\n    37→      l.is_full,\n    38→      l.telegram_link,\n    39→      l.max_group_size,\n    40→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    41→      lm.joined_at,\n    42→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    43→    FROM listing_members lm\n    44→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    45→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    46→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    47→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    48→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    49→\n    50→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    53→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    54→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    55→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    56→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    57→\n    58→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    59→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    60→  const active = readings.filter(\n    61→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  return NextResponse.json({\n    65→    active,\n    66→    history,\n    67→    upcoming,\n    68→    total: readings.length,\n    69→  });\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"a9ae422e-2b75-469a-aded-f13114df17d8","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:36.893Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01MQJ43t2PRHMsMGXrPQyftQ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QFB6bGkBuQPD74KLPQK26d","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4804,"cache_read_input_tokens":33239,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4804,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"70f9c6cd-cc80-407a-9cb5-d72f9038423b"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QFB6bGkBuQPD74KLPQK26d","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"3def062a-60fc-4349-9e6d-61987d55989b","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:37.349Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014UmK2u76ydfrS32uEbH7z6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    36→\n    37→  if (\n    38→    !discordLink ||\n    39→    !(\n    40→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    41→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    42→    )\n    43→  ) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      {\n    46→        error:\n    47→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/...)\",\n    48→      },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    54→    discordLink.trim(),\n    55→    listingId\n    56→  );\n    57→\n    58→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    59→}\n    60→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"0a655800-77ca-4b25-99a5-8dc85e3a2eb6","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:37.695Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LcjRu4iQHH1TDqxymfz6PN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    15→setInterval(() => {\n    16→  const now = Date.now();\n    17→  for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    18→    entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    19→    if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    20→      store.delete(key);\n    21→    }\n    22→  }\n    23→}, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    24→\n    25→/**\n    26→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    27→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    28→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    29→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    30→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    31→ */\n    32→export function checkRateLimit(\n    33→  key: string,\n    34→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    35→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    36→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    37→  const now = Date.now();\n    38→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    39→\n    40→  if (!entry) {\n    41→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    42→    store.set(key, entry);\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    46→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    47→\n    48→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    49→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    50→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    51→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    55→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"bf9686f0-faa8-417c-9c0e-bbc21ade9750","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:44.117Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Uoe8c5nRpRYXs7uWcVKkQ6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import db from \"./db\";\n     2→import { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n     3→\n     4→function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n     5→  const user = db\n     6→    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n     7→    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n     8→  return user?.email || null;\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→export function createNotification(\n    12→  userId: number,\n    13→  listingId: number,\n    14→  type: string,\n    15→  message: string\n    16→) {\n    17→  db.prepare(\n    18→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    19→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    20→\n    21→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    22→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    23→  if (email) {\n    24→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    25→    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n    26→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    27→    });\n    28→  }\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→function getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n    32→  switch (type) {\n    33→    case \"new_member\":\n    34→      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    35→    case \"group_full\":\n    36→      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    37→    case \"application_received\":\n    38→      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    39→    case \"application_approved\":\n    40→      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    41→    case \"application_rejected\":\n    42→      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    43→    case \"rating_received\":\n    44→      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    45→    case \"listing_deleted\":\n    46→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    47→    case \"listing_updated\":\n    48→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    49→    default:\n    50→      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function notifyListingAuthor(\n    55→  listingId: number,\n    56→  joinerName: string\n    57→) {\n    58→  const listing = db\n    59→    .prepare(\n    60→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    61→    )\n    62→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    63→\n    64→  if (listing) {\n    65→    createNotification(\n    66→      listing.author_id,\n    67→      listingId,\n    68→      \"new_member\",\n    69→      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    70→    );\n    71→  }\n    72→}\n    73→\n    74→export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n    75→  listingId: number,\n    76→  applicantName: string\n    77→) {\n    78→  const listing = db\n    79→    .prepare(\n    80→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    81→    )\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (listing) {\n    85→    createNotification(\n    86→      listing.author_id,\n    87→      listingId,\n    88→      \"application_received\",\n    89→      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    90→    );\n    91→  }\n    92→}\n    93→\n    94→export function notifyApplicationDecision(\n    95→  userId: number,\n    96→  listingId: number,\n    97→  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n    98→) {\n    99→  const listing = db\n   100→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   101→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n   102→\n   103→  if (listing) {\n   104→    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n   105→    const message =\n   106→      decision === \"approved\"\n   107→        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n   108→        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n   109→    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n   110→  }\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n   114→  const listing = db\n   115→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   116→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string } | undefined;\n   117→  const members = db\n   118→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   119→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   120→\n   121→  if (listing) {\n   122→    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   123→    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n   124→      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   125→      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   126→    const message = botConfigured\n   127→      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   128→      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   129→\n   130→    for (const member of members) {\n   131→      createNotification(\n   132→        member.user_id,\n   133→        listingId,\n   134→        \"group_full\",\n   135→        message\n   136→      );\n   137→    }\n   138→  }\n   139→}\n   140→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"494a48cf-c312-4d4b-9b6d-4e44dbcffa07","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:44.219Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017mSh5kiGnRj2HrGBtsrUoL","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     6→ *\n     7→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_014Rf2TDS9WgVriUmgNYZCyb","session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"7302388b-a3b8-4b9a-9ec9-2f7f5e13f62d","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:02:47.812Z"}
