getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\nimport { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\n\nexport interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nconst DEV_SECRET =\n  \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\";\n\nfunction getSessionOptions(): SessionOptions {\n  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    throw new Error(\n      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    );\n  }\n  return {\n    password: secret || DEV_SECRET,\n    cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n    cookieOptions: {\n      httpOnly: true,\n      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n      sameSite: \"lax\",\n      maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n    },\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function getSession() {\n  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, getSessionOptions());\n}\n\nexport async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":22,"oldLines":7,"newStart":22,"newLines":7,"lines":["     cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",","     cookieOptions: {","       httpOnly: true,","- {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015bJQi6xxV3u8sZNU1E7vFE","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"1c5ebc3b-8a94-4626-893b-884b56ff57c8","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:04:55.533Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","oldString":"  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;","newString":"  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }\n\n  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    params.push(meetingFormat);\n  }\n\n  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(startDateFrom);\n  }\n\n  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n\n  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n\n  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n\n  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n  const countResult = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    )\n    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n\n  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listings,\n    pagination: {\n      page,\n      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n      total: countResult.total,\n      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":7,"newStart":13,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";","   const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";","   const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);","-  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;","+  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);"," ","   const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];","   const params: (string | number)[] = [];"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_0123vi59J6m9E62ZjAyTybp8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01UuFPvptXTeGNmbucZenob7","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    // Delete in a transaction\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Notify members before deletion\n      for (const member of members) {\n        try {\n          createNotification(\n            member.user_id,\n            listingId,\n            \"listing_deleted\",\n            `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n          );\n        } catch {\n          // Notification failure should not block deletion\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Delete related records first\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      // Delete the listing itself\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();","new_string":"    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1801,"cache_read_input_tokens":49751,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1801},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"e421502a-bc1b-44d0-a083-ae47a455825c"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UuFPvptXTeGNmbucZenob7","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"64400c38-e54b-4d8b-8f37-cba60256c459","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:05:05.256Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    // Delete in a transaction\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Notify members before deletion\n      for (const member of members) {\n        try {\n          createNotification(\n            member.user_id,\n            listingId,\n            \"listing_deleted\",\n            `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n          );\n        } catch {\n          // Notification failure should not block deletion\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Delete related records first\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      // Delete the listing itself\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();","newString":"    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...listing,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10));\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Notify members before deletion\n      for (const member of members) {\n        try {\n          createNotification(\n            member.user_id,\n            listingId,\n            \"listing_deleted\",\n            `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n          );\n        } catch {\n          // Notification failure should not block deletion\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Delete related records first\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      // Delete the listing itself\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":283,"oldLines":33,"newStart":283,"newLines":31,"lines":["       .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")","       .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];"," ","-    // Delete in a transaction","+    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)","     const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {","-      // Notify members before deletion","-      for (const member of members) {","-        try {","-          createNotification(","-            member.user_id,","-            listingId,","-            \"listing_deleted\",","-            `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`","-          );","-        } catch {","-          // Notification failure should not block deletion","-        }","-      }","-","-      // Delete related records first","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","-      // Delete the listing itself","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);","     });"," ","     deleteTransaction();"," ","+    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)","+    for (const member of members) {","+      try {","+        createNotification(","+          member.user_id,","+          null,","+          \"listing_deleted\",","+          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`","+        );","+      } catch {","+        // Notification failure should not block response","+      }","+    }","+","     return NextResponse.json({ success: true });","   } catch (error) {","     console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U49oEMcS59R71gjPwM1pqr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import db from \"./db\";\n     2→import { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n     3→\n     4→function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n     5→  const user = db\n     6→    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n     7→    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n     8→  return user?.email || null;\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→export function createNotification(\n    12→  userId: number,\n    13→  listingId: number,\n    14→  type: string,\n    15→  message: string\n    16→) {\n    17→  db.prepare(\n    18→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    19→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    20→\n    21→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    22→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    23→  if (email) {\n    24→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    25→    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n    26→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    27→    });\n    28→  }\n    29→}\n    30→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"e2ea63a8-0a03-46bf-b1ad-cfc6075a2dd3","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:05:08.160Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","content":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":30,"startLine":1,"totalLines":140}}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"68079745-d94d-492e-8a9b-8fbea4234b7f","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:05:20.890Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"export function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n)","newString":"export function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n)","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string } | undefined;\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":10,"oldLines":7,"newStart":10,"newLines":7,"lines":[" "," export function createNotification(","   userId: number,","-  listingId: number,","+  listingId: number | null,","   type: string,","   message: string"," ) {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01ER8sYfsaTGEvV35zcnfvNZ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email)) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"6b2a1e95-09ea-4b7d-b5f2-82963561d40b","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:05:54.748Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    if (!allowed) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    if (password.length > 72) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (email.length > 254) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n        { status: 400 }","numLines":60,"startLine":1,"totalLines":108}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014GhqfPJFXB6gDCbQw14J6Z","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"2430a3ad-a3e4-44df-aede-5ddd0e3bdd12","timestamp":"2026-03-23T16:05:58.445Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts","oldString":"    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email)) {","newString":"    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    if (!allowed) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    if (password.length > 72) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (email.length > 254) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Check if email is already taken\n    const existing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n      .get(email);\n    if (existing) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n      )\n      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n\n    // Auto-login after registration\n    const session = await getSession();\n    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    await session.save();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        user: {\n          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n        },\n      },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":54,"oldLines":7,"newStart":54,"newLines":7,"lines":["       );","     }"," ","-    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email)) {","+    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {","       return NextResponse.json(","         { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },","         { status: 400 }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CmrPDxzLmqTMhKMwFqSqxt","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0128NTcL8VGNt5pnRPXwvzhh","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --repo TommyBrennan/bookmate --title \"fix: validation gaps, delete notification bug, secure cookie\" -p \"Bookmate\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- Fix falsy check on `score=0` in ratings API (use `== null` instead of `!`)\n- Add 512-char length cap on telegram and discord invite links to prevent DB inflation\n- Add email format validation (`user@domain.tld`) in registration endpoint\n- Fix delete transaction immediately wiping its own notifications — move `createNotification` calls after the transaction completes\n- Fix `secure` cookie flag incompatible with HTTP-only production (now requires `HTTPS_ENABLED=true` env var)\n- Cap page number at 1000 to prevent expensive SQLite OFFSET scans\n\nCloses #76\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 82 tests pass\n- [x] Build succeeds\n- [x] Lint clean\n- [ ] Verify registration rejects invalid emails (e.g., `notanemail`)\n- [ ] Verify score=0 gets proper error message\n- [ ] Verify link length > 512 is rejected\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create PR"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":371,"cache_read_input_tokens":58311,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":371},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"ed68b992-7de9-48b7-834e-a4d2e65b96c7"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01GHrv1RX61d7J4UGxDpCZyW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015GvddYEmmSozrXPXF2myGm","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-23-1600.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-23 16:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nResolved P0 production-down issue (#74), closed completed issue (#73), code-reviewed app and found 6 bugs. Created issue #76, implemented fixes in PR #77, merged and deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Was reported down (#74) but recovered by 15:55 UTC (PM2 auto-restart after build dir missing). Confirmed healthy — HTTP 200, API responsive, 8 listings served.\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~4 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **Issue #73**: Already fixed in previous session (PR #75), closed.\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #74: Production is down (closed)\nProduction had recovered before this session started. PM2 logs showed build directory briefly missing at 11:54 UTC, causing restart loop. Stable since 15:55 UTC. Commented with evidence and closed.\n\n### Issue #76: Code review fixes (PR #77 — merged & deployed)\n\n6 bugs fixed:\n\n1. **Ratings falsy check on score=0** — `!score` rejects 0 with wrong error. Changed to `score == null`.\n2. **No length cap on telegram/discord links** — Added 512-char max to prevent DB inflation.\n3. **No email format validation** — Added regex check in registration (after trim).\n4. **Delete notifications immediately wiped** — `createNotification` inside transaction was deleted by same transaction's `DELETE FROM notifications`. Moved notifications after transaction with `listing_id: null`.\n5. **Secure cookie on HTTP production** — `secure: true` set when NODE_ENV=production but app served over HTTP. Now requires `HTTPS_ENABLED=true` env var.\n6. **Unbounded page offset** — Capped page number at 1000 to prevent expensive SQLite scans.\n\n**Testing:** Build passes, all 82 tests pass, lint clean. Production deployed and verified healthy.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Still needs-human. ~4 days remaining — critical.\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human.\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — ~4 days, critical\n3. Look for new improvements or proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":205,"cache_read_input_tokens":60430,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":205},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"7367eb3d-2a4e-41e4-83ce-e6e4f7edcb35"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CgAkh3i8sVigsufFwzuar5","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Session Complete ✅\n\nHere's what I accomplished this session:\n\n### Issues Resolved\n1. **#74 (P0) — Production is down**: Verified production had auto-recovered via PM2 restarts. Documented root cause (missing build directory during deploy) and closed.\n2. **#73 (P1) — Code review fixes**: Already completed in previous session. Closed.\n3. **#76 (P1) — New code review findings**: Found and fixed 6 bugs via code review:\n   - Ratings `score=0` rejected with wrong error (falsy check)\n   - No length cap on telegram/discord links (unbounded DB writes)\n   - No email format validation in registration\n   - Delete transaction immediately wiping its own notifications\n   - `secure` cookie flag breaking auth on HTTP production\n   - Unbounded page offset enabling expensive SQLite scans\n\n### Deployment\n- PR #77 merged, production rebuilt and restarted\n- Verified healthy: HTTP 200, API serving 8 listings\n\n### Remaining Open Issues\n- **#54**: GitHub PAT expires in ~4 days (needs-human)\n- **#21**: Telegram bot token needed (needs-human)"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":392,"cache_read_input_tokens":61378,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":392},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e6c5b6af-5ee0-4bf9-8487-53d9644319a7","uuid":"09fd7c86-ffa6-418b-80fb-9b2720715c50"}
